section_miscategorizations.text: He has a history of feeding difficulties, including episodes of apnea during feeding, and has been evaluated by an allergist and neurologist, who diagnosed the syndrome due to delayed walking and lack of independent sitting at one year of age.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The diagnostic attribution of Smith-Magenis syndrome based on developmental delays and specialist evaluations reflects clinician synthesis and diagnostic impression rather than purely patient-reported history.
Autism is an active comorbid diagnosis and belongs more appropriately in the problem list/diagnostic impression rather than in the symptom chronology.

section_miscategorizations.text: Several organ systems can be affected by this chromosomal deletion syndrome, including congenital anomalies of the kidney and urinary tract.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is not an exam or test finding but a general pathophysiologic statement about the syndrome, representing clinician synthesis and risk assessment rather than objective findings.

section_miscategorizations.text: A geneticist has reported that individuals with this syndrome may experience kidney problems and leg issues, leading to an orthopedics evaluation.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a generalized risk statement and prior specialist impression about the syndrome, not a specific exam, lab, or imaging result for this patient; it fits better as part of the diagnostic assessment and rationale for further workup.
